message:
test(cached, paginator, measure-cache, event-coalescer): add 15 unit tests

- cached.rs: with_hash constructor, NoCacheKey/HashKey defaults, state new/default equivalence
- paginator.rs: render in Page/Dots modes, dots_middle_page, default symbols
- measure_cache.rs: WidgetId from_ptr differs, new cache empty, zero-total hit rate
- event_coalescer.rs: Default trait, scroll direction change flush, scroll count after flush, scroll right

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
